payload.author: claude
payload.body: Delivered: trust check --format sarif (single + walked tree), valid SARIF 2.1.0, explain rejects it. FOLLOW-UP: wire a CI job that runs trust check --rules bugs --format sarif and uploads via github/codeql-action/upload-sarif so Trust self-reports in the Security tab; deferred because it needs a clean (or allow-listed) baseline first.
